## What & why

<!-- What does this change add or update, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Doc is in the folder matching its **type** (see [`CONVENTIONS.md`](../CONVENTIONS.md)).
- [ ] Frontmatter is complete: `title`, `description`, `owner`, `updated` (today's date).
- [ ] Added/updated the entry in the folder's `README.md` index.
- [ ] Added a dated bullet to the **top** of [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md).
- [ ] Links are relative and resolve.
- [ ] If editing an **ADR or incident**: superseded/linked forward rather than rewriting history.
